title: ranunculus paranephrophyllus
intro: Ranunculus paranephrophyllus, commonly known as the lesser celandine or pilewort, is a perennial plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is valued for its ability to support kidney and urinary system health. The health benefits of Ranunculus paranephrophyllus include its ability to reduce inflammation and pain, and to promote the healing of wounds and the treatment of various skin conditions. Ranunculus paranephrophyllus is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and has been used in herbal medicine for centuries to support overall health and well-being.
